x-component.description: Extract a list of possible terms found in the source content. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

outputPath.description: Full path of the output file
outputPath.title: Output path

autoOpen.title: Open the result file after completion
autoOpen.description: Automatically open the result file in the default application after completion

minWordsPerTerm.description: A term will be made up at least of that many words
minWordsPerTerm.title: Minimum number of words per term

maxWordsPerTerm.description: A term will be made up at the most of that many words
maxWordsPerTerm.title: Maximum number of words per term

minOccurrences.description: A term will have at least that many occurrences
minOccurrences.title: Minimum number of occurrences per term

stopWordsPath.description: Full path of the file containing stop words
stopWordsPath.title: Path of the file with stop words (leave empty for default)

notStartWordsPath.description: Full path of the file containing not-start words
notStartWordsPath.title: Path of the file with not-start words (leave empty for default)

notEndWordsPath.description: Full path of the file containing not-end words
notEndWordsPath.title: Path of the file with not-end words (leave empty for default)

keepCase.title: Preserve case differences
keepCase.description: Treat words with different casing as distinct tokens (e.g. 'Term' vs 'term')

removeSubTerms.title: Remove entries that seem to be sub-strings of longer entries
removeSubTerms.description: Remove candidate terms that are sub-sequences of longer retained terms

sortByOccurrence.title: Sort the results by the number of occurrences
sortByOccurrence.description: Sort output by occurrence count instead of alphabetically

useTerminologyAnnotations.title: Use Terminology annotations
useTerminologyAnnotations.description: Include terms from ITS Terminology annotations attached to text units

useTextAnalysisAnnotations.title: Use Text Analysis annotations
useTextAnalysisAnnotations.description: Include terms from Text Analysis annotation spans on source content

useStatistics.title: Use tokens-grouping statistics
useStatistics.description: Find term candidates using frequency-based statistical analysis of word sequences
